25: ## AR-001: Sandbox Orchestration
26: 
27: ### Purpose
28: Kubernetes CRDs (AgentRuntime, CodeInterpreter) + Gin HTTP workload manager that creates/deletes sandbox pods via agent-sandbox controller.
29: 
30: ### Files to Create
31: 
32: #### Go Module Root
33: | File | Purpose |
34: |------|---------|
35: | `go.mod` | Module `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube`, Go 1.24.4, toolchain go1.24.9 |
36: | `go.sum` | Checksums for all dependencies |
37:

40: |------|---------|

44: | `codeinterpreter_types.go` | `CodeInterpreter`, `CodeInterpreterSpec`, `CodeInterpreterStatus`, `CodeInterpreterSandboxTemplate`, `TargetPort`, `AuthModeType`, `ProtocolType`, `AuthModePicoD`, `AuthModeNone` constants |
45: | `zz_generated.deepcopy.go` | `DeepCopy` methods for all types (generated) |

48: | File | Purpose |
49: |------|---------|

51:

53: | File | Purpose |
54: |------|---------|
55: | `errors.go` | Sentinel errors: `ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound`, `ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound`, `ErrTemplateMissing`, `ErrPublicKeyMissing`, `ErrNotFound`; `NewSessionNotFoundError`, `NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError`, `NewUpstreamUnavailableError`, `NewInternalError` |
56: | `api_status.go` | `APIStatus` interface, error-to-status mapping |
57: 
58: #### Workload Manager ŌĆö `pkg/workloadmanager/`
59: | File | Purpose |
60: |------|---------|
61: | `config.go` | `Config` struct: `Port`, `RuntimeClassName`, `EnableTLS`, `TLSCert`, `TLSKey`, `EnableAuth` |
62: | `server.go` | `Server` struct, `NewServer`, `Start`, `shutdown` methods; HTTP server with Gin, h2c, timeouts |
63: | `routes.go` | Route registration: `GET /health`, `/v1/agent-runtime` (POST/DELETE), `/v1/code-interpreter` (POST/DELETE) with middleware ordering |
64: | `handlers.go` | `handleHealth`, `handleAgentRuntimeCreate`, `handleCodeInterpreterCreate`, `handleDeleteSandbox`; `ErrorResponse` struct |
65: | `validation.go` | `CreateSandboxRequest.Validate()` with `ErrInvalidRequest` |
66: | `auth.go` | `TokenCache` (LRU, 1000 entries, 5m TTL); `authMiddleware`; `validateServiceAccountToken` via TokenReview; `GetOrCreateUserK8sClient`; context keys: `userToken`, `serviceAccount`, `serviceAccountName`, `namespace` |
67: | `k8s_client.go` | `K8sClient` struct; REST config with QPS=50, Burst=100; `NewClientCache(100)`; pod informer/lister |
68: | `informers.go` | `Informers` struct; `AgentRuntimeGVR`, `CodeInterpreterGVR`, `SandboxGVR`, `SandboxClaimGVR`; informer factory setup; `SyncWithTimeout` |
69: | `sandbox_builder.go` | `buildSandboxObject` for AgentRuntime; `buildSandboxClaimObject` for CodeInterpreter warm pool; `IdentitySecretName`, `PublicKeyDataKey`, `IdentitySecretNamespace`; `buildEntryPoints` |
70: | `sandbox_reconciler.go` | `SandboxReconciler` with watchers map; `Reconcile` watches Sandbox status; `WatchSandboxOnce`; `getSandboxStatus` returns "running"/"unknown" |
71: | `pod_resolver.go` | `resolvePodIP` ŌĆö checks `agents.x-k8s.io/sandbox-pod-name` annotation first, falls back to label selector `runtime.agentcube.io/sandbox-name` |
72: | `garbage_collector.go` | `garbageCollector` struct; tick every 15s; per-tick 2min context; `ListInactiveSandboxes` cutoff `now-15m`, batch 16; `ListExpiredSandboxes`, batch 16; delete+store cleanup |
73: | `client_cache.go` | `ClientCache` for per-user dynamic clients keyed by `namespace:serviceAccountName` |
74: | `store_interface.go` | Store interface (imported from `pkg/store`) |

76: #### Workload Manager Binary ŌĆö `cmd/workload-manager/`
77: | File | Purpose |
78: |------|---------|
79: | `main.go` | CLI flags: `-port` (8080), `-runtime-class-name` (kuasar-vmm), `-enable-tls`, `-tls-cert`, `-tls-key`, `-enable-auth`; manager with metrics/health disabled; informer sync; signal handler; shutdown 15s |
80: 
81: ### Key Logic
82: 
83: 1. **CRD registration**: kubebuilder markers generate CRD YAML in `manifests/charts/base/crds/`
84: 2. **Auth flow**: When `EnableAuth=true`, middleware validates Bearer token via K8s TokenReview API; caches results LRU; extracts `system:serviceaccount:<ns>:<name>`
85: 3. **Create flow**: Validate request ŌåÆ Store placeholder SandboxInfo ŌåÆ Create Sandbox/SandboxClaim CR ŌåÆ Watch for "running" status (2min timeout) ŌåÆ Resolve pod IP ŌåÆ Update store with full info ŌåÆ Return entry points
86: 4. **Delete flow**: Load from store ŌåÆ Delete Sandbox/SandboxClaim ŌåÆ Delete store entry
87: 5. **GC flow**: Goroutine every 15s; batch queries inactive (15m cutoff) and expired; merge, delete each; remove store entries
88:

91: ## AR-002: Session Routing
92: 
93: ### Purpose
94: Router HTTP server that resolves/creates sessions via workload manager and reverse-proxies to sandbox pods with JWT signing.
95: 
96: ### Files to Create
97: 
98: #### Router Package ŌĆö `pkg/router/`
99: | File | Purpose |
100: |------|---------|
101: | `config.go` | `Config` struct: `Port`, `Debug`, `EnableTLS`, `TLSCert`, `TLSKey`, `MaxConcurrentRequests` |
102: | `server.go` | `Server` struct; `NewServer` (enforces MaxConcurrentRequests default 1000); `Start`, `shutdown`; h2c, timeouts 30s/90s |
103: | `routes.go` | Route table: `GET/POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path`, same for code-interpreters; `/health/live`, `/health/ready` |
104: | `session_manager.go` | `SessionManager` interface; `manager` struct; `NewSessionManager` requires `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL`; `GetSandboxBySession` ŌĆö if no session header, POST create; if session, GET from store |
105: | `proxy.go` | `forwardToSandbox`; determines upstream from EntryPoints (path prefix match or first); builds `httputil.NewSingleHostReverseProxy`; custom Director sets headers, path, JWT; `ModifyResponse` sets `x-agentcube-session-id` |
106: | `jwt.go` | `JWTManager` struct; RSA 2048 key; `jwtExpiration` 5min; RS256 signing; `GenerateToken`; `TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret` creates/loads `picod-router-identity` Secret in `IdentityNamespace` |
107: | `concurrency.go` | `concurrencyLimitMiddleware` using buffered channel; 429 response with `SERVER_OVERLOADED` |
108: | `health.go` | `handleHealthLive` ŌåÆ `{"status":"alive"}`; `handleHealthReady` ŌåÆ 200 or 503 |
109: | `error_handler.go` | `handleGetSandboxError` maps errors to responses; proxy error mapping: `connection refused`ŌåÆ502, `timeout`ŌåÆ504 |
110: 
111: #### Router Binary ŌĆö `cmd/router/`
112: | File | Purpose |
113: |------|---------|
114: | `main.go` | Flags: `-port` (8080), `-enable-tls`, `-tls-cert`, `-tls-key`, `-debug`, `-max-concurrent-requests` (1000); loads `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` for JWT secret namespace |
115: 
116: ### Key Logic
117: 
118: 1. **Session resolution**: Check `x-agentcube-session-id` header; absent ŌåÆ POST to workload manager; present ŌåÆ load from store
119: 2. **Proxy upstream**: Match invocation path against EntryPoints[].Path prefix; fallback to first entry point
120: 3. **JWT signing**: For Sandbox/SandboxClaim kinds, generate RS256 JWT (5min expiry) and set `Authorization: Bearer` on proxied request
121: 4. **Forwarding headers**: `X-Forwarded-Host`, `X-Forwarded-Proto`, `X-Forwarded-For`; `x-agentcube-session-id` on response
122: 5. **Last activity**: `UpdateSessionLastActivity` called twice per request (before and after proxy)
123: 6. **Concurrency**: Semaphore middleware on `/v1/*` with configurable capacity
124: 
125: ---

127: ## AR-003: Session Store
128: 
129: ### Purpose
130: Redis and Valkey backends for session persistence with expiry and last-activity sorted sets.
131: 
132: ### Files to Create
133: 
134: #### Store Package ŌĆö `pkg/store/`
135: | File | Purpose |
136: |------|---------|
137: | `interface.go` | `Store` interface: `Ping`, `GetSandboxBySessionID`, `StoreSandbox`, `UpdateSandbox`, `DeleteSandboxBySessionID`, `ListExpiredSandboxes`, `ListInactiveSandboxes`, `UpdateSessionLastActivity`, `Close` |
138: | `errors.go` | `ErrNotFound = errors.New("store: not found")` |
139: | `singleton.go` | `Storage()` singleton via `sync.Once`; `initStore` reads `STORE_TYPE` (default redis); env var reading |
140: | `redis.go` | `redisStore` struct; `makeRedisOptions`; all operations via go-redis/v9 |
141: | `valkey.go` | `valkeyStore` struct; `makeValkeyOptions`; all operations via valkey-go |
142: 
143: ### Operation Details
144: 
145: | Operation | Redis | Valkey |
146: |-----------|-------|--------|
147: | Ping | `PING` ŌåÆ "PONG" | `B().Ping()` ŌåÆ "PONG" |
148: | StoreSandbox | Pipeline: `SETNX` session key, `ZADD` expiry, `ZADD` last_activity | `DoMulti`: SETNX, ZADD ├Ś2 |
149: | UpdateSandbox | `SET key value XX` | `SET ... XX` |
150: | DeleteSandboxBySessionID | Pipeline: `DEL`, `ZREM` ├Ś2 | `DoMulti`: DEL, ZREM ├Ś2 |
151: | ListExpiredSandboxes | `ZRANGEBYSCORE session:expiry -inf {before.Unix} LIMIT 0 limit` + pipeline GETs | `Zrangebyscore` with Min/Max/Limit + MGET |
152: | ListInactiveSandboxes | `ZRANGEBYSCORE session:last_activity -inf {before.Unix} LIMIT 0 limit` + pipeline GETs | Same on last_activity key |
153: | UpdateSessionLastActivity | `GET` existence check + `ZADD` | `Exists` + `Zadd` |
154: 
155: ### Environment Variables
156: 
157: | Variable | Redis | Valkey |
158: |----------|-------|--------|
159: | ADDR | `REDIS_ADDR` (required) | `VALKEY_ADDR` (comma-separated) |
160: | PASSWORD | `REDIS_PASSWORD` (required unless `REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false`) | `VALKEY_PASSWORD` (required unless `VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED=false`) |
161: | STORE_TYPE | Default `redis` | Must be `valkey` |
162: | Optional | ŌĆö | `VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE=true`, `VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE=true` |
163: 
164: ### Key Logic
165: 
166: 1. **Key patterns**: `session:{id}` for JSON doc; `session:expiry` ZSET (score = ExpiresAt Unix); `session:last_activity` ZSET (score = activity Unix)
167: 2. **StoreSandbox atomicity**: Pipeline/multi ensures all-or-nothing
168: 3. **UpdateSandbox**: Only updates JSON value, never touches ZSETs
169: 4. **DeleteSandboxBySessionID**: Removes all three keys atomically
170: 5. **Orphan handling**: ZSET members without corresponding JSON keys are skipped during listing
171: 
172: ---

174: ## AR-004: CLI Toolkit
175: 
176: ### Purpose
177: Python CLI tool (`kubectl-agentcube`) for pack, build, publish, invoke, status commands.
178: 
179: ### Files to Create
180: 
181: #### Package Root ŌĆö `cmd/cli/`
182: | File | Purpose |
183: |------|---------|
184: | `pyproject.toml` | Package `agentcube`, dependencies, console script `kubectl-agentcube`, Python Ōēź3.10 |
185: 
186: #### Package `agentcube/` ŌĆö `agentcube/`
187: | File | Purpose |
188: |------|---------|
189: | `__init__.py` | `__version__ = "0.1.0"`, `__author__`, `__email__`; exports `app`, `PackRuntime`, `BuildRuntime`, `PublishRuntime`, `InvokeRuntime` |
190: | `cli/main.py` | Typer app "agentcube"; root callback with `--version` (eager, prints version + `typer.Exit()`), `--verbose`/`-v`; commands: `pack`, `build`, `publish`, `invoke`, `status`; `_handle_error` helper |
191: | `models/pack_models.py` | `MetadataOptions` dataclass with all fields from design spec |
192: | `runtime/__init__.py` | Re-exports runtimes + MetadataOptions |
193: | `runtime/pack_runtime.py` | `PackRuntime` class with `pack()`, workspace validation, metadata merge, Dockerfile generation |
194: | `runtime/build_runtime.py` | `BuildRuntime` with version increment, local Docker build, cloud build |
195: | `runtime/publish_runtime.py` | `PublishRuntime` with agentcube CR and k8s provider flows |
196: | `runtime/invoke_runtime.py` | `InvokeRuntime` with HTTP invocation, session header handling |
197: | `runtime/status_runtime.py` | `StatusRuntime` with k8s and CR status reads |
198: | `services/__init__.py` | Services package docstring |
199: | `services/metadata_service.py` | `AgentMetadata` Pydantic model, `MetadataService` with load/save/update |
200: | `services/docker_service.py` | `DockerService` with `check_docker_available`, `build_image`, `push_image`, `remove_image` |
201: | `services/k8s_provider.py` | `KubernetesProvider` with Deployment/Service CRUD, readiness wait |
202: | `services/agentcube_provider.py` | `AgentCubeProvider` with AgentRuntime CR management |
203: 
204: ### Key Logic
205: 
206: 1. **Version callback**: `--version` prints "AgentCube CLI (kubectl agentcube) version: 0.1.0" and exits
207: 2. **Verbose logging**: `logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)` when `--verbose` or `-v`
208: 3. **Error handling**: `_handle_error(e, command_name, verbose)` prints red error, optional traceback, `typer.Exit(1)`
209: 4. **Pack**: Validates workspace structure (Python needs `*.py`, Java needs `pom.xml`); generates Dockerfile; saves `agent_metadata.yaml`
210: 5. **Build**: Bumps version; Docker SDK for local builds; version revert on failure
211: 6. **Publish**: agentcube provider ŌåÆ AgentRuntime CR; k8s provider ŌåÆ Deployment + NodePort; readiness wait 120s
212: 7. **Invoke**: JSON payload parse; header parsing `key:value`; session header from metadata; URL rewrite for AgentRuntime
213: 8. **Status**: Rich Table display; exits 1 for `not_published` or `error`
214:

217: ## AR-005: Python SDK
218: 
219: ### Purpose
220: Python SDK (`agentcube-sdk`) for CodeInterpreter and AgentRuntime clients.
221: 
222: ### Files to Create
223: 
224: #### Package Root ŌĆö `sdk-python/`
225: | File | Purpose |
226: |------|---------|
227: | `pyproject.toml` | Package `agentcube-sdk`, Python Ōēź3.10, dependencies: `requests`, `PyJWT>=2.0.0`, `cryptography` |
228: 
229: #### Package `agentcube/` ŌĆö `agentcube/`
230: | File | Purpose |
231: |------|---------|
232: | `__init__.py` | Exports `CodeInterpreterClient`, `AgentRuntimeClient` |
233: | `exceptions.py` | `AgentCubeError`, `CommandExecutionError`, `SessionError`, `DataPlaneError` |
234: | `code_interpreter.py` | `CodeInterpreterClient` ŌĆö context manager, `execute_command`, `run_code`, `write_file`, `upload_file`, `download_file`, `list_files`, `stop` |
235: | `agent_runtime.py` | `AgentRuntimeClient` ŌĆö context manager, `invoke`, `close`, session bootstrap |
236: | `clients/__init__.py` | Exports `ControlPlaneClient`, `CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient`, `AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient` |
237: | `clients/control_plane.py` | `ControlPlaneClient` ŌĆö `create_session`, `delete_session`, HTTP session pooling |
238: | `clients/code_interpreter_data_plane.py` | `CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient` ŌĆö execute, files API (base64 JSON + multipart) |
239: | `clients/agent_runtime_data_plane.py` | `AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient` ŌĆö `SESSION_HEADER = "x-agentcube-session-id"`, `bootstrap_session_id`, `invoke` |
240: | `utils/__init__.py` | Module marker |
241: | `utils/http.py` | `create_session` factory with HTTPAdapter pooling |
242: | `utils/utils.py` | `read_token_from_file` for K8s service account token |
243: | `utils/log.py` | `get_logger` factory |
244: 
245: ### Key Logic
246: 
247: 1. **CodeInterpreterClient**: `__init__` requires `router_url` (arg or `ROUTER_URL` env); creates session via `ControlPlaneClient` if no `session_id`; context manager cleans up data plane + control plane
248: 2. **Control plane**: `create_session` POSTs to `/v1/code-interpreter`; `delete_session` DELETE to `/v1/code-interpreter/sessions/{id}` (404 treated as success)
249: 3. **Execute command**: Body `{"command": [...], "timeout": "<n>s"}`; read timeout = timeout + 2.0s buffer
250: 4. **File upload**: JSON path ŌåÆ base64 content POST to `api/files`; multipart path ŌåÆ `x-agentcube-session-id` header
251: 5. **AgentRuntimeClient**: `bootstrap_session_id` GETs invocation base URL and reads `x-agentcube-session-id` response header
252: 6. **Timeouts**: Default 120s read, 5.0s connect; per-call override supported
253: 7. **Session header**: Lowercase `x-agentcube-session-id` throughout
254:

257: ## AR-006: Code Execution (PicoD)
258: 
259: ### Purpose
260: HTTP daemon (`picod`) that executes commands in a workspace jail with JWT authentication.
261: 
262: ### Files to Create
263: 
264: #### PicoD Package ŌĆö `pkg/picod/`
265: | File | Purpose |
266: |------|---------|
267: | `config.go` | `Config` struct: `Port`, `Workspace` |
268: | `server.go` | `Server` struct with Gin engine, `AuthManager`, `startTime`, `workspaceDir`; `NewServer` loads public key, resolves workspace; `Run` starts HTTP server |
269: | `auth.go` | `AuthManager` with `publicKey *rsa.PublicKey`; `LoadPublicKeyFromEnv` from `PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY`; `AuthMiddleware` ŌĆö validates Bearer JWT with RS256, `WithExpirationRequired`, `WithIssuedAt`, `WithLeeway(1min)`; wraps body with `MaxBytesReader(32MiB)` |
270: | `execute.go` | `ExecuteRequest`/`ExecuteResponse` structs; `ExecuteHandler` ŌĆö `exec.CommandContext`, no stdin, buffers stdout/stderr; `TimeoutExitCode = 124`; duration calculation |
271: | `files.go` | `FileInfo`, `UploadFileRequest`, `FileEntry`, `ListFilesResponse`; `UploadFileHandler` ŌĆö multipart vs JSON detection, `parseFileMode` (max 0777, default 0644); `ListFilesHandler`; `DownloadFileHandler` with download headers; `MkdirAll` 0755 |
272: | `health.go` | `HealthCheckHandler` ŌĆö `status: ok`, `service: PicoD`, `version: 0.0.1`, `uptime` |
273: | `path.go` | `sanitizePath` ŌĆö symlink resolution, `filepath.Rel` escape check, returns safe absolute path |
274: | `routes.go` | Route registration: `/api` group with `AuthMiddleware`, `POST /execute`, `POST/GET /files`, `GET /files/*path`; `/health` bypasses auth |
275: 
276: #### PicoD Binary ŌĆö `cmd/picod/`
277: | File | Purpose |
278: |------|---------|
279: | `main.go` | Flags: `-port` (8080), `-workspace` (default CWD); `klog.InitFlags`; constructs `picod.Config`, `picod.NewServer`, `server.Run()` |
280: 
281: ### Key Logic
282: 
283: 1. **JWT validation**: Requires RSA public key at startup (fatal if missing/invalid); rejects non-RSA signing methods
284: 2. **Execute**: `command[0]` with args; `TimeoutExitCode=124` on deadline exceeded; duration in seconds float
285: 3. **File path security**: `sanitizePath` resolves symlinks and verifies path stays within `workspaceDir`
286: 4. **Upload modes**: `parseFileMode` accepts octal string; max 0777; invalid/empty ŌåÆ 0644
287: 5. **Download headers**: `Content-Description: File Transfer`, `Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary`, `Content-Disposition: attachment`, `Content-Type` via `mime.TypeByExtension`
288: 6. **Health**: Unauthenticated; reports uptime via `time.Since(startTime)`
289:

292: ## AR-007: Idle Cleanup (agentd)
293: 
294: ### Purpose
295: Kubernetes controller that deletes idle Sandbox resources after 15 minutes of inactivity.
296: 
297: ### Files to Create
298: 
299: #### Agentd Package ŌĆö `pkg/agentd/`
300: | File | Purpose |
301: |------|---------|
302: | `controller.go` | `Reconciler` struct embedding `client.Client`; `Reconcile` algorithm: Get Sandbox ŌåÆ check `last-activity-time` annotation ŌåÆ parse RFC3339 ŌåÆ if expired (now > lastActivity + 15min) ŌåÆ Delete; if parse error ŌåÆ RequeueAfter 30s; if not expired ŌåÆ RequeueAfter time.Until(expirationTime) |
303: | `controller_test.go` | Unit tests for Reconcile logic |
304: 
305: #### Agentd Binary ŌĆö `cmd/agentd/`
306: | File | Purpose |
307: |------|---------|
308: | `main.go` | Scheme: `core` + `sandboxv1alpha1`; `Manager` with `Metrics: {BindAddress: "0"}`, `HealthProbeBindAddress: "0"`; controller via `SetupWithManager`; `mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler())` |
309: 
310: ### Key Logic
311: 
312: 1. **Annotation key**: `workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey` = `"last-activity-time"` (imported from workloadmanager package)
313: 2. **Timeout**: `SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute`
314: 3. **Reconcile branches**: NotFound ŌåÆ return; parse error ŌåÆ RequeueAfter 30s; expired ŌåÆ Delete; not expired ŌåÆ RequeueAfter remaining time
315: 4. **Delete idempotency**: NotFound treated as success; other errors propagate for retry
316: 
317: ---

320: 
321: ### Purpose

341: |------|---------|
342: | `Dockerfile` | Multi-stage: golang:1.24.9-alpine builder (CGO_ENABLED=0, BuildKit cache mounts) ŌåÆ alpine:3.19 runtime (UID 1000 apiserver), port 8080 |
343: | `Dockerfile.router` | Same pattern: golang:1.24.9-alpine builder ŌåÆ alpine:3.19 runtime (UID 1000 router), port 8080, args `--port=8080 --debug` |
344: | `Dockerfile.picod` | golang:1.24.4 builder ŌåÆ ubuntu:24.04 runtime (root), python3 installed |
345: 
346: #### Makefile
347: | File | Purpose |
348: |------|---------|
349: | `Makefile` | Full Makefile with all targets from design spec: `gen-crd`, `generate`, `gen-client`, `gen-all`, `gen-check`, `build`, `build-agentd`, `build-router`, `build-all`, `docker-build`, `docker-buildx`, `docker-buildx-push`, `docker-build-router/picod` variants, `e2e`, `e2e-clean`, `lint`, `test`, `deps`, `gen-copyright`, controller-gen/golangci-lint download |
350: 
351: #### Hack Scripts ŌĆö `hack/`
352: | File | Purpose |
353: |------|---------|
354: | `update-codegen.sh` | k8s.io/code-generator v0.34.1, generates client-go |
355: | `update-copyright.sh` | Prepends Apache boilerplate to Go/Python files |
356: | `boilerplate.go.txt` | Go copyright header |
357: | `boilerplate.py.txt` | Python copyright header |
358: 
359: ### Key Logic
360: 
361: 1. **RBAC**: Workload manager ClusterRole with full agent-sandbox + CRD + tokenreviews + secrets rules; optional router Role for secrets
362: 2. **Redis env**: Both components receive `REDIS_ADDR` and `REDIS_PASSWORD` from chart values
363: 3. **Router ŌåÆ Workload Manager**: `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` = `http://workloadmanager.{ns}.svc.cluster.local:{port}`
364: 4. **Volcano scheduler**: Conditional on `volcano.scheduler.enabled`; creates full stack including SA, ConfigMap, ClusterRole, Service, Deployment
365: 5. **CRDs**: Shipped in chart `crds/` directory; scope Namespaced; API group `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh`
366: 
367: ---
368: 
369: ## AR-009: CI/CD
370: 
371: ### Purpose
372: GitHub Actions workflows for build, test, lint, release, and E2E validation.
373: 
374: ### Files to Create
375: 
376: #### Workflows ŌĆö `.github/workflows/`
377: | File | Workflow Name | Purpose |
378: |------|---------------|---------|
379: | `main.yml` | Agentcube CI Workflow | PR to main/release-* ŌåÆ Docker Buildx + `make docker-build` |
380: | `e2e.yml` | Agentcube E2E Tests | PR to main/release-* ŌåÆ Kind v0.30.0 + `make e2e` + artifact upload on failure |
381: | `lint.yml` | Lint | Path-filter Go ŌåÆ golangci-lint |
382: | `test-coverage.yml` | Test Coverage | `go test -race -coverprofile` + Codecov upload |
383: | `codegen-check.yml` | Codegen Check | Path-filter API/hack ŌåÆ `make gen-check` |
384: | `copyright-check.yml` | Copyright Check | Path-filter ŌåÆ `make gen-copyright` + diff |
385: | `codespell.yml` | Codespell | Backup false-positive files ŌåÆ codespell ŌåÆ restore |
386: | `python-lint.yml` | Python Lint | Path-filter Python ŌåÆ ruff |
387: | `python-sdk-tests.yml` | Python SDK Tests | Path-filter sdk-python ŌåÆ pytest |
388: | `build-push-release.yml` | Build and Push Release Images | Push to main/tag ŌåÆ GHCR login + `make docker-buildx-push*` |
389: | `dify-plugin-publish.yml` | Dify Plugin Publish | Tag `dify-plugin/v*` ŌåÆ plugin package + cross-repo PR |
390: | `workflows-approve.yml` | Approve Workflows | `pull_request_target` ŌåÆ first-time contributor approval |
391: 
392: #### E2E Test Infrastructure ŌĆö `test/e2e/`
393: | File | Purpose |
394: |------|---------|
395: | `run_e2e.sh` | Kind cluster creation, CRD/agent-sandbox installation, Helm install, port forwards, Go + Python tests |
396: | `e2e_test.go` | Go E2E tests for AgentRuntime and CodeInterpreter |
397: | `test_codeinterpreter.py` | Python E2E tests using SDK |
398: | `echo_agent.yaml` | Echo AgentRuntime fixture |
399: | `e2e_code_interpreter.yaml` | CodeInterpreter fixture |
400: | `e2e_code_interpreter_warmpool.yaml` | Warm pool fixture |
401: | `README.md` | E2E documentation |
402: 
403: ### Key Logic
404: 
405: 1. **Path filtering**: Each workflow uses dorny/paths-filter for relevant file changes
406: 2. **Go version**: Lint/codegen/coverage use Go 1.24; E2E uses Go 1.23
407: 3. **Kind**: v0.30.0 via helm/kind-action with `install_only: true`; cluster created by `run_e2e.sh`
408: 4. **E2E steps**: Create cluster ŌåÆ Load images ŌåÆ Install CRDs ŌåÆ Helm install ŌåÆ Port forwards ŌåÆ Wait for health ŌåÆ Run tests
409: 5. **Release**: TAG from `github.ref_name` for tags, else `latest`; multi-arch buildx push to GHCR
410: 
411: ---
412: 
413: ## AR-010: Integrations
414: 
415: ### Purpose
416: Dify plugin for AgentCube code interpreter + PCAP analyzer FastAPI service.
417: 
418: ### Files to Create
419: 
420: #### Dify Plugin ŌĆö `integrations/dify-plugin/`
421: | File | Purpose |
422: |------|---------|
423: | `manifest.yaml` | Plugin manifest: version 0.0.2, type plugin, author volcano-sh, multilingual labels, resource permissions, tool provider reference |
424: | `main.py` | `Plugin(DifyPluginEnv(MAX_REQUEST_TIMEOUT=120)).run()` |
425: | `requirements.txt` | `dify-plugin>=0.4.2,<0.5.0`, `agentcube-sdk>=0.0.10` |
426: | `provider/agentcube.yaml` | Tool provider identity, tool list, Python source reference |
427: | `provider/agentcube.py` | `AgentcubeCodeInterpreterProvider` with `_validate_credentials` |
428: | `tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.yaml` | Tool schema: required `router_url`, `workload_manager_url`; optional `language` (python/js/ts), `code`, `command`, `session_id`, `session_reuse`, `code_interpreter_id` |
429: | `tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.py` | `AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool` with `_invoke` ŌåÆ `execute()` ŌåÆ `create_json_message` |
430: | `GUIDE.md`, `README.md`, `PRIVACY.md`, `.difyignore` | Documentation and packaging |
431: 
432: #### PCAP Analyzer ŌĆö `example/pcap-analyzer/`
433: | File | Purpose |
434: |------|---------|
435: | `pcap_analyzer.py` | FastAPI app with `SandboxRunner` class; `build_react_agent`, `build_planner_agent`, `build_reporter_agent`; `AnalyzeResponse` model; `POST /analyze` endpoint; startup validation of `OPENAI_API_KEY` |
436: | `requirements.txt` | FastAPI 0.120.0, uvicorn, LangChain/LangGraph stack, langchain-openai, paramiko, multipart |
437: | `Dockerfile` | uv base image, venv, installs reqs, copies `sdk-python/agentcube`, `PYTHONPATH=/app`, port 8000, `uv run pcap_analyzer.py` |
438: | `deployment.yaml` | K8s Deployment: image `pcap-analyzer:latest`, resources (200m-1 CPU, 100Mi-1Gi), secret for API key, all AgentCube + model env vars, command `["uv", "run", "pcap_analyzer.py"]` |
439: | `README.md` | Usage documentation |
440: 
441: ### Key Logic
442: 
443: 1. **Dify plugin**: Uses `agentcube.CodeInterpreterClient` internally; session reuse via `session_reuse` param
444: 2. **PCAP analyzer**: Startup requires valid `OPENAI_API_KEY`; uses LangGraph ReAct agents; `SandboxRunner` wraps CodeInterpreterClient for shell commands
445: 3. **Analysis flow**: Plan script ŌåÆ Execute in sandbox ŌåÆ Repair on failure (2 retries) ŌåÆ Report results
446: 4. **Sandbox warmup**: `SandboxRunner` waits `SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC` (default 5) on init
447: 
448: ---
449: 
450: ## AR-011: client-go Generated Library
451: 
452: ### Purpose
453: Generated Kubernetes typed client for `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`.
454: 
455: ### Files to Create (generated structure)
456: 
457: #### Clientset ŌĆö `client-go/clientset/versioned/`
458: | File | Purpose |
459: |------|---------|
460: | `clientset.go` | `Interface`, `Clientset` struct with RESTClient + RuntimeV1alpha1; constructors `NewForConfig`, `NewForConfigAndClient`, `NewForConfigOrDie`, `New` |
461: | `scheme/register.go` | `Scheme`, `Codecs`, `ParameterCodec`, `AddToScheme` |
462: | `scheme/doc.go` | Package doc |
463: | `fake/clientset_generated.go` | `NewSimpleClientset`, `NewClientset` |
464: | `fake/register.go` | Fake scheme wiring |
465: | `fake/doc.go` | Doc |
466: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/runtime_client.go` | `RuntimeV1alpha1Interface`, `RuntimeV1alpha1Client` with REST defaults |
467: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/agentruntime.go` | `AgentRuntimesGetter`, `AgentRuntimeInterface` ŌĆö all CRUD + Patch + Watch methods |
468: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/codeinterpreter.go` | `CodeInterpretersGetter`, `CodeInterpreterInterface` ŌĆö same pattern |
469: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/generated_expansion.go` | Expansion interfaces (empty) |
470: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/doc.go` | Doc |
471: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/fake/fake_runtime_client.go` | Fake runtime client |
472: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/fake/fake_agentruntime.go` | Fake AgentRuntime client |
473: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/fake/fake_codeinterpreter.go` | Fake CodeInterpreter client |
474: | `typed/runtime/v1alpha1/fake/doc.go` | Doc |
475: 
476: #### Informers ŌĆö `client-go/informers/externalversions/`
477: | File | Purpose |
478: |------|---------|
479: | `factory.go` | `SharedInformerFactory` with `Start`, `Shutdown`, `WaitForCacheSync`, `ForResource`; constructors with options |
480: | `generic.go` | `GenericInformer`, `ForResource` routing by GVR |
481: | `runtime/interface.go` | `Interface`, `V1alpha1()` accessor |
482: | `runtime/v1alpha1/interface.go` | `Interface` with `AgentRuntimes()`, `CodeInterpreters()` |
483: | `runtime/v1alpha1/agentruntime.go` | `AgentRuntimeInformer`, `NewAgentRuntimeInformer`, `NewFilteredAgentRuntimeInformer` |
484: | `runtime/v1alpha1/codeinterpreter.go` | `CodeInterpreterInformer`, constructors |
485: | `internalinterfaces/factory_interfaces.go` | `NewInformerFunc`, `SharedInformerFactory` interface, `TweakListOptionsFunc` |
486: 
487: #### Listers ŌĆö `client-go/listers/runtime/v1alpha1/`
488: | File | Purpose |
489: |------|---------|
490: | `agentruntime.go` | `AgentRuntimeLister`, `AgentRuntimeNamespaceLister` with `List`, `Get`, namespace accessor |
491: | `codeinterpreter.go` | `CodeInterpreterLister`, `CodeInterpreterNamespaceLister` ŌĆö same pattern |
492: | `expansion_generated.go` | Expansion interfaces for all lister types |
493: 
494: ### Key Logic
495: 
496: 1. **Resource plural**: `agentruntimes`, `codeinterpreters`
497: 2. **Scheme**: Registers `runtime/v1alpha1` types; `SchemeGroupVersion` = `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`
498: 3. **REST paths**: `/apis/runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1/namespaces/{ns}/agentruntimes`
499: 4. **Generators**: `hack/update-codegen.sh` using `k8s.io/code-generator` v0.34.1; post-processes lister GroupResource calls
500: 
501: ---
502: 
503: ## Implementation Order
504: 
505: ```
506: Phase 1: Core Types (AR-001, AR-003)
507:   1. go.mod + go.sum
508:   2. pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/ ŌĆö CRD types
509:   3. pkg/common/types/
510:   4. pkg/api/
511:   5. pkg/store/ ŌĆö Redis + Valkey implementations
512: 
513: Phase 2: Server Components (AR-001, AR-002)
514:   6. pkg/workloadmanager/
515:   7. cmd/workload-manager/
516:   8. pkg/router/
517:   9. cmd/router/
518:   10. pkg/picod/
519:   11. cmd/picod/
520: 
521: Phase 3: Controller & Storage (AR-007)
522:   12. pkg/agentd/
523:   13. cmd/agentd/
524: 
525: Phase 4: Python (AR-004, AR-005)
526:   14. cmd/cli/ ŌĆö CLI toolkit
527:   15. sdk-python/ ŌĆö Python SDK
528: 
529: Phase 5: Deployment & CI (AR-008, AR-009, AR-011)
530:   16. manifests/charts/base/ ŌĆö Helm chart
531:   17. docker/ ŌĆö Dockerfiles
532:   18. Makefile + hack/
533:   19. .github/workflows/
534:   20. test/e2e/
535:   21. client-go/ ŌĆö generated library
536: 
537: Phase 6: Integrations (AR-010)
538:   22. integrations/dify-plugin/
539:   23. example/pcap-analyzer/
540: ```
541: 
542: ---
543: 
544: ## Dependency Graph
545: 
546: ```
547: go.mod (module github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube)
548: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1 ŌåÉ k8s.io/api, k8s.io/apimachinery, kubebuilder
549: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/common/types ŌåÉ (internal)
550: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/api ŌåÉ k8s.io/apimachinery, apierrors
551: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/store ŌåÉ go-redis/v9, valkey-go, k8s.io/klog/v2
552: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/workloadmanager ŌåÉ gin, k8s.io/client-go, agent-sandbox API, store, api, common/types
553: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/router ŌåÉ gin, jwt/v5, k8s.io/client-go, store, api, common/types
554: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/picod ŌåÉ gin, jwt/v5, golang-jwt
555: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ pkg/agentd ŌåÉ sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime, agent-sandbox API, workloadmanager (annotation key)
556: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ cmd/workload-manager ŌåÉ workloadmanager, k8s.io/client-go, controller-runtime
557: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ cmd/router ŌåÉ router, k8s.io/client-go
558: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ cmd/picod ŌåÉ picod
559: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ cmd/agentd ŌåÉ agentd, sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime
560: Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ client-go ŌåÉ k8s.io/code-generator output (standalone module)
561: ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ manifests/charts/base/crds/ ŌåÉ generated from pkg/apis
562: ```

(End of file - total 562 lines)
</content>

metadata.preview:
# AgentCube Implementation Plan ŌĆö AR-001 through AR-011

> Generated: 2026-03-22 | Source: `specs/` (reverse-engineered from `github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube`)

---

## AR Mapping

| AR | Spec Module | Component | Language |
|----|-------------|-----------|----------|
| AR-001 | sandbox-orchestration | Kubernetes CRDs + Workload Manager API | Go |
| AR-002 | session-routing | Router HTTP proxy + session management | Go |
| AR-003 | session-store | Redis/Valkey persistence layer | Go |
| AR-004 | cli-toolkit | Python CLI (`kubectl-agentcube`) | Python |
| AR-005 | python-sdk | Python SDK (`agentcube-sdk`) | Python |
| AR-006 | code-execution | PicoD HTTP daemon | Go |
| AR-007 | idle-cleanup | agentd controller | Go |
| AR-008 | deployment | Helm chart + Dockerfiles + Makefile | YAML/Shell |
| AR-009 | ci-cd | GitHub Actions workflows + E2E tests | YAML/Go |
| AR-010 | integrations | Dify plugin + PCAP analyzer | Python |

part.text: AR-012 through AR-022 don't exist. The project only defines AR-001 through AR-011 (sandbox-orchestration, session-routing, session-store, cli-toolkit, python-sdk, code-execution, idle-cleanup, deployment, ci-cd, integrations, client-go).
